CVE-2025-14911.title: User-controlled chunkSize metadata from MongoDB lacks appropriate ...
CVE-2025-14911.description: User-controlled chunkSize metadata from MongoDB lacks appropriate validation allowing malformed GridFS metadata to overflow the bounding container.

CVE-2026-4359.title: A compromised third party cloud server or man-in-the-middle attac ...
CVE-2026-4359.description: A compromised third party cloud server or man-in-the-middle attacker could send a malformed HTTP response and cause a crash in applications using the MongoDB C driver.
